title: Tea Lights, 12 Pack Flameless LED Tea Light Candles 200 Hours Realistic Flickering Battery Operated Tea Lights Electric Fake Candles for Halloween Christmas Weding in Warm Yellow
features: ✔ PACKAGE INCLUDE. -12 Pack of Flameless Led tea light candles(Size: Φ 3.7cm x H 3.4cm). Batteries are included and installed. On/Off switch for easy & convenient operation.
✔ LONG BATTERY LIFE. Each Candle lights use a CR2032 button cell which is very efficient and easy to buy online or from local store. Last about 200 hours with a new battery.

✔ SAFE FOR KIDS, SENIORS - Without fire, smoke and These LED tealights can be used without having to worry of flame, absolutely no fire hazards or burning risks, safe for families with pet(s) or young child(ren).

✔ PLANNING AN EVENT? - The amber color Realistic and Bright Flickering Battery Operated Tea Lights provide realistic flickering effect, ideal for accent decorations for holiday celebrations, wedding ceremonies, special occasions such as birthdays and anniversaries, memorial services, church gatherings, DIY projects and etc. Wind-proof for both indoors and outdoors use, at homes, restaurants, churches, schools, backyards, sports venues and etc.

✔ 100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE. All the led tea lights are thoroughly and rigorously tested .These tealight candles have pass CE certification.If you have any questions,please let us know.We will give you solutions.
description: Product Description Anziner led tea lights Warm ambience.Beautiful glow. Anziner 12 Pack Battery Operated warm yellow led tealights Specification: Material: LED+PP. Size: Diameter 3.4 cm / 1.34 inch + Height 3.6 cm/1.42 inch. Battery: CR 2032 button cell included Light color: warm yellow. Package List:12 * LED Tea Lights Lighting effect: Flickering Anziner LED tea lights give you the innovative way to brighten home Safe for usage Make candle drips a thing of the past with Anziner LED tea light candles. Place it on top of books or wood and never worry about ruining surfaces with hot wax drips again. Turn it on with a switch of a button, no match stick or lighter needed. Suitable for kids' DIY projects. Put it inside paper flowers and leave it for the night with your mind at ease. Make your home beautiful The Warm Yellow Tea light Candle is designed to flicker in a realistic way so that one can feel the ambience of an actual candle flame without any hazard or hassles. Very easy to use, these Fake candles can be turned on and off by the flick of a switch. Romantic ambience to any place Anziner Warm Yellow Flameless Candles add a warm and romantic ambience to any place,These flameless LED tea lights are ideal for Parties, Dinners, Dating, Weddings, Festivals celebration, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Valentine’s Day and Christmas. These candles can also be patterned silhouettes to create a unique candlelit environment especially for bars, hotels and outdoor such as pool beach camping or other occasions. Anziner Romantic flameless candles Warm Yellow Cool White Warm White
